hero.title: Join the Cursor Guatemala community
hero.subtitle: Explore and connect with the Cursor Guatemala community at meetups, hackathons, coworking sessions, and more.

activities.heading: What we're doing in Guatemala.
activities.subheading: From a table at a café to a finished project over the weekend. That's how things happen at Cursor Guatemala events.

cafeCursor.title: Café Cursor
cafeCursor.description: We meet at local cafés to code together as a community. Come collaborate with local developers, enjoy good coffee, and earn Cursor credits.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: Hands-on learning sessions led by community professionals. Master advanced workflows and learn to unlock the full potential of Cursor.

meetups.title: Meetups
meetups.description: In-person events to connect with Guatemala's tech ecosystem. Enjoy short talks, live demos, and networking.

hackathons.title: Hackathons
hackathons.description: Weekend-long build competitions. Design and launch real projects, win prizes, and team up with other professionals across the country.

footer.madeWith: Made with Cursor by ambassadors in Guatemala 🇬🇹

featured.defaultDescription: A practical, hands-on workshop series for builders who want to learn Cursor with real workflows.

photos.title: A note on photos
photos.description: We'll be taking photos and videos during the event for social media and future Cursor Community content.
photos.preference: If you'd prefer not to be photographed:
photos.option1: Let the host know when you arrive
photos.option2: We'll make sure to respect your preference

matchmaking.title: Want to meet new people?
matchmaking.step1: Come to the host table and grab a {numberCard} (1-10)
matchmaking.question2: "Are you building something cool with Cursor?"

worldEvents.title: Cursor Guatemala in action
worldEvents.subtitle: From Guatemala City to Antigua
worldEvents.description: From Guatemala City to Antigua, the Cursor community is growing. Meetups, hackathons, and cafés — together we're building the future.
worldEvents.carouselDescription: Highlights and moments from our local Cursor community in {location}. A look at the gatherings where we share knowledge and drive tech forward.
